title: Remove dead code: StreamView.Update() in Go
description: stream.go:261-267 StreamView.Update() method is defined but never called. Remove dead code.

title: Fix goroutine leak in Go directory walk
description: watcher.go:700 filepath.Walk() doesn't check ctx.Done() in callback. If watcher stopped during large directory walk, goroutine continues until walk completes.

title: Fix O(n²) string parsing in Rust watcher
description: watcher.rs:726 uses line.chars().nth(end) in a loop which is O(n) per call, making overall O(n²). Convert to byte indexing or char iterator for O(n).

title: Align 'G' key behavior between Go and Rust
description: Go version enables auto-scroll when pressing G to go to bottom. Rust version just scrolls without enabling auto-scroll. Should be consistent.

title: Fix race condition in Go session discovery
